title: Surgeon Vacancy at Roche India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Roche India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Roche India Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Kanpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Roche India Advisory Limited:
Roche India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Roche India Advisory Limited!
